scripts.quality:test: rm -rf .quality-test && tsc lib/questionQuality.ts lib/questionDesignRules.ts lib/studyProgram.ts lib/types.ts --module commonjs --moduleResolution node --target es2020 --outDir .quality-test --esModuleInterop --skipLibCheck --noEmit false && node scripts/question-quality-test.cjs .quality-test && rm -rf .quality-test
scripts.readiness:test: rm -rf .readiness-test && tsc lib/blockReadiness.ts lib/questionQuality.ts lib/questionDesignRules.ts lib/studyProgram.ts lib/types.ts --module commonjs --moduleResolution node --target es2020 --outDir .readiness-test --esModuleInterop --skipLibCheck --noEmit false && node scripts/block-readiness-test.cjs .readiness-test && rm -rf .readiness-test
scripts.catalog:test: rm -rf .catalog-test && tsc lib/assessmentCatalog.ts lib/types.ts --module commonjs --moduleResolution node --target es2020 --outDir .catalog-test --esModuleInterop --skipLibCheck --noEmit false && node scripts/assessment-catalog-test.cjs ./.catalog-test/assessmentCatalog.js && rm -rf .catalog-test
